'''鈭歾-v-j''' ('''kazavaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xerox|xerox]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-v-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xerox|xerox]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-v-j
|-
! Lemma
| kazavaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizavaj|thizavaj]] || [[word:jizavaj|jizavaj]] || [[word:shizavaj|shizavaj]] || [[word:kizavaj|kizavaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzavaj|thuthuzavaj]] || [[word:jujuzavaj|jujuzavaj]] || [[word:shushuzavaj|shushuzavaj]] || [[word:kukuzavaj|kukuzavaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzavaj|thuzavaj]] || [[word:juzavaj|juzavaj]] || [[word:shuzavaj|shuzavaj]] || [[word:kuzavaj|kuzavaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzavaj|thuzavaj]] || [[word:juzavaj|juzavaj]] || [[word:shuzavaj|shuzavaj]] || [[word:kuzavaj|kuzavaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezavaj|thezavaj]] || [[word:jezavaj|jezavaj]] || [[word:shezavaj|shezavaj]] || [[word:kezavaj|kezavaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozavaj|thothozavaj]] || [[word:jojozavaj|jojozavaj]] || [[word:shoshozavaj|shoshozavaj]] || [[word:kokozavaj|kokozavaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozavaj|thozavaj]] || [[word:jozavaj|jozavaj]] || [[word:shozavaj|shozavaj]] || [[word:kozavaj|kozavaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozavaj|thozavaj]] || [[word:jozavaj|jozavaj]] || [[word:shozavaj|shozavaj]] || [[word:kozavaj|kozavaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zavaj|th忙zavaj]] || [[word:j忙zavaj|j忙zavaj]] || [[word:sh忙zavaj|sh忙zavaj]] || [[word:k忙zavaj|k忙zavaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazavaj|thathazavaj]] || [[word:jajazavaj|jajazavaj]] || [[word:shashazavaj|shashazavaj]] || [[word:kakazavaj|kakazavaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazavaj|thazavaj]] || [[word:jazavaj|jazavaj]] || [[word:shazavaj|shazavaj]] || [[word:kazavaj|kazavaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazavaj|thazavaj]] || [[word:jazavaj|jazavaj]] || [[word:shazavaj|shazavaj]] || [[word:kazavaj|kazavaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazavaj|shazavaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazavaj|goshazavaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazavaj|gokishazavaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazavajn眉|shazavajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazavajnkn眉|goshazavajnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazavajn眉|gokishazavajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazavajsh毛|shazavajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazavajnksh毛|goshazavajnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazavajsh毛|gokishazavajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazavajro|shazavajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazavajnkro|goshazavajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazavajro|gokishazavajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazavajmu|shazavajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazavajnkmu|goshazavajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazavajmu|gokishazavajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazavajsher|shazavajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazavajnksher|goshazavajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazavajsher|gokishazavajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazavajng|shazavajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazavajnkng|goshazavajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazavajng|gokishazavajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazavajya|shazavajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazavajnkya|goshazavajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazavajya|gokishazavajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazavajyam|shazavajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazavajnkyam|goshazavajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazavajyam|gokishazavajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazavajn眉sh毛|shazavajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazavajnkn眉sh毛|goshazavajnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazavajn眉sh毛|gokishazavajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazavajn眉ro|shazavajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazavajnkn眉ro|goshazavajnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazavajn眉ro|gokishazavajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazavajn眉mu|shazavajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazavajnkn眉mu|goshazavajnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazavajn眉mu|gokishazavajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazavajsh毛n眉|shazavajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazavajnksh毛n眉|goshazavajnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazavajsh毛n眉|gokishazavajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazavajsh毛ro|shazavajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazavajnksh毛ro|goshazavajnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazavajsh毛ro|gokishazavajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazavajsh毛mu|shazavajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazavajnksh毛mu|goshazavajnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazavajsh毛mu|gokishazavajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazavajron眉|shazavajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazavajnkron眉|goshazavajnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazavajron眉|gokishazavajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazavajrosh毛|shazavajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazavajnkrosh毛|goshazavajnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazavajrosh毛|gokishazavajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazavajromu|shazavajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazavajnkromu|goshazavajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazavajromu|gokishazavajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazavajmun眉|shazavajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazavajnkmun眉|goshazavajnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazavajmun眉|gokishazavajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazavajmush毛|shazavajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazavajnkmush毛|goshazavajnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazavajmush毛|gokishazavajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazavajmuro|shazavajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazavajnkmuro|goshazavajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazavajmuro|gokishazavajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
